name: Autonomous-Resolution-Rate (ARR)
description: The percentage of 'End-to-End' Work-Orders completed, policy-validated, and archived without Slot-10 (Director) intervention.
goalMapping: Measures the maturity of the 'Sangama-Directive' as a self-governing entity and maximizes Director 'Deep-Work' time.

thresholds.critical: < 75% (Triggers 'Operational-Inversion-Protocol' — System is too dependent on Director)
